auth_access_model: The published ontology artifacts are currently public and readable without credentials.
identifier_systems: DFO-specific OWL and SKOS term identifiers

discovery_search.note: The current skill searches and fetches published JSON-LD terms.

metadata_schema.note: Ontology metadata, labels, definitions, and DFO-specific term IRIs are exposed.

entity_lookup.note: Ontology-term lookup exists, but operational stock/site identity lookup does not.

identifier_crosswalks.note: The ontology can model DFO-specific mapping context, but it is not the operational identity graph.

abundance_assessment.note: The repo has not yet verified DFO assessment-semantic coverage as a maintained capability contract.

telemetry_passage.note: The repo has not yet verified DFO telemetry or passage semantic coverage as a maintained capability contract.

hatchery.note: The repo has not yet verified DFO hatchery-semantic coverage as a maintained capability contract.

harvest_fishery.note: The repo has not yet verified DFO fishery-semantic coverage as a maintained capability contract.

genetics_gsi.note: The repo has not yet verified DFO genetics or GSI semantic coverage as a maintained capability contract.

package_metadata_export.note: The ontology is a semantic layer, not a package/export engine.

provenance_versioning.note: Published ontology metadata exposes version, import, and modification details.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: Published JSON-LD is machine-readable, but there is no richer first-class API surface.

blockers: The ontology is schema, not operational instance data.
Coverage claims beyond term lookup are not yet maintained as verified platform capabilities.
governance_constraints: DFO-specific terms should remain separate from shared `smn` terms unless explicit promotion criteria are met.
